name: Home & Kitchen
description: Items for cooking, dining, and everyday household use, including cookware, small appliances, and kitchen tools.

name: Furniture
description: Functional and decorative furnishings for living rooms, bedrooms, offices, and outdoor spaces.

name: Beauty & Personal Care
description: Skincare, haircare, cosmetics, and grooming products used in daily personal care routines.

name: Health & Wellness
description: Vitamins, supplements, fitness aids, and products that support physical and mental well-being.

name: Sports & Outdoors
description: Equipment and gear for sports, fitness, camping, and outdoor recreational activities.

name: Toys & Games
description: Playthings, board games, puzzles, and entertainment items designed for children and adults.

name: Books & Media
description: Printed books, eBooks, audiobooks, movies, and music in physical or digital formats.

name: Automotive
description: Parts, accessories, tools, and maintenance products for cars, motorcycles, and other vehicles.

name: Garden & Outdoor Living
description: Plants, gardening tools, patio furniture, and equipment for maintaining outdoor spaces.

name: Office Supplies
description: Stationery, organizational tools, and equipment used in offices, schools, and home workspaces.

name: Pet Supplies
description: Food, toys, grooming products, and accessories for the care of household pets.

name: Baby & Kids
description: Products designed for infants and young children, including gear, feeding supplies, and nursery items.

name: Jewelry & Watches
description: Necklaces, rings, bracelets, watches, and other decorative accessories worn on the body.

name: Arts & Crafts
description: Supplies and materials for drawing, painting, sewing, and other creative hobby projects.

name: Tools & Hardware
description: Hand tools, power tools, fasteners, and equipment used for building and repair tasks.

name: Travel & Luggage
description: Suitcases, backpacks, travel accessories, and gear designed for trips and daily commuting.

name: Musical Instruments
description: Instruments, accessories, and equipment for playing, recording, and performing music.

name: Footwear
description: Shoes, boots, sandals, and other types of footwear for various occasions and activities.
